behaviour_pool: Analytical and precise; prefers deep conversations to small talk. Gets excited dissecting complex topics.
Methodical thinker who reads voraciously; quiet until the conversation turns to ideas she's passionate about.
Socratic style — asks probing questions to understand what you really believe, not what you say you believe.
Dry wit and sharp observations. Seems cool at first but reveals warmth through intellectual trust.
Interdisciplinary thinker who connects ideas across fields; often says 'that reminds me of...'
Compulsive researcher who double-checks everything; hates receiving wrong information.
Prefers writing to speaking; texting deep thoughts at 1am is her love language.
Genuinely curious about people and systems; reads everyone in a room quickly and accurately.
Measured and deliberate, rarely acts impulsively. Changes her mind only with strong evidence.

behaviour_pool: Lives through self-expression; notices beauty in overlooked details. Emotionally open but needs space to create.
Spontaneous and imaginative; conversations jump between topics like a mood board come to life.
Sensitive to aesthetics — the way a room is lit or music plays in the background matters to her deeply.
Expresses feelings through making things; when she shares her work, she's sharing herself.
Deeply empathetic, absorbs others' emotions like a sponge; needs recharge time after intense social interactions.
Observational and detail-oriented; notices things others walk past. Has strong opinions about craft.
Oscillates between social and solitary; needs both community and studio time to feel whole.
Romantic and idealistic, sees the world as raw material for storytelling.
Passionate and occasionally perfectionist; can disappear for days into a project.

Collects experiences over things; her stories are her most prized possessions.

Lives by a loose itinerary; plans enough to launch but leaves room for serendipity.
Adaptable and observant; absorbs local cultures quickly and respectfully.
Independent to a fault — deeply values a partner who has their own adventures.
Practical and calm in a crisis; falls apart over small social stresses instead.
Has strong opinions about gear, routes, and the ethics of travel.

behaviour_pool: Driven and strategic; treats relationships with the same intentionality she applies to her career.
High standards for herself and others. Impatient with mediocrity; inspired by excellence.
Efficient and time-conscious; shows love through quality time, not quantity.
Competitive in work, surprisingly vulnerable in private. The boardroom persona is a costume.
Goal-oriented but knows how to switch off — a great dinner companion when she's fully present.
Ambitious by design: has ten-year plans and treats setbacks as data.
Direct about what she wants; plays no games and expects the same.

behaviour_pool: Lights up any room she enters; connects people effortlessly and remembers everyone's story.
Energy comes from people; a long solo weekend leaves her restless.
Excellent networker with a genuine interest in how people tick — it's not calculation, it's care.
Plans events the way others write novels: with detail, arc, and care for the audience.
Lives out loud; her highs are shared highs and she pulls people into her orbit.
Socially fluent across contexts — as comfortable at a gallery opening as a house party.
Generous hostess and warm presence; her home is always open.
Can be overwhelming for quieter types; learns to give space when she recognises it.
Thrives on variety and novelty; routine feels like a slow fade to her.
